suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document how workers should handle tasks whose required implementation already exists in the incoming dirty tree so they know when validation-only completion is acceptable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The ensure-root-user-auth-regression review notes prior handoff feedback asked for guidance on already-implemented work discovered in the dirty tree, and the skill still does not explicitly describe that case.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Keep the explicit fallback procedure for proving ensure_root_user behavior via a tiny injectable seam when no dedicated auth regression path exists, because the fix feature succeeded by adding ensure_root_user_with plus focused tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The original runtime review failed for missing ensure_root_user runtime coverage, and the passing fix review shows the minimal injectable seam approach was the effective resolution.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reconcile GitNexus guidance with the actual installed CLI capability, because the docs require gitnexus_detect_changes() but worker evidence reports the detect_changes command is unavailable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The ensure-root-user-auth-regression review records a failed attempt to run the detect_changes CLI subcommand while repository guidance still mandates detect_changes before commit.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add auth regression seam guidance to .factory/library/rust-2024-upgrade.md.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected because this is procedural worker guidance rather than stable codebase knowledge, so it belongs in skills or orchestrator instructions instead of the shared library.

rejectedObservations.observation: Re-apply the previously mixed-scope rust-edition-upgrade-worker skill edit as a scrutiny-side update.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected because the repository already contains the updated skill guidance; the old failure was about mixed feature scope, not missing current guidance.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeat the earlier review-orchestration recommendation about cross-checking handoff commit IDs.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected for this rerun because neither fix review surfaced an active misrouting problem; the current synthesis is scoped to validating the two fix features from the current tree.
